title: A New Project at Work
article_text: My sister has a big responsibility at her job. She works for a creative agency in the city. Her original idea for a new garden design won a prize. She wants to fix the garden before summer, so she must work hard. Her dream is to start her own company one day. She can easily cross the river to visit the university. She does not like rock music, nor does she enjoy loud parties. She saved enough dollars to buy a new house. Her proposal for the project is a legal document. After a long conversation with her boss, she felt good about the future.

sentences.en: My sister has a big responsibility at her job.
sentences.zh: 我姐姐在工作上承担着重大责任。

words.eng_def: a duty or task that you must do

sentences.en: She works for a creative agency in the city.
sentences.zh: 她在城里一家创意机构工作。

words.eng_def: a business that provides a service

sentences.en: Her original idea for a new garden design won a prize.
sentences.zh: 她为一座新花园设计的原创想法赢得了奖项。

words.eng_def: new and different; not a copy
an area for growing flowers or plants

sentences.en: She wants to fix the garden before summer, so she must work hard.
sentences.zh: 她想在夏天前修好花园，所以她必须努力工作。

words.eng_def: to make something work again or put it in good condition

sentences.en: Her dream is to start her own company one day.
sentences.zh: 她的梦想是有一天创办自己的公司。

words.eng_def: a wish or goal for the future

sentences.en: She can easily cross the river to visit the university.
sentences.zh: 她可以轻松过河去参观大学。

words.eng_def: to go from one side to the other

sentences.en: She does not like rock music, nor does she enjoy loud parties.
sentences.zh: 她不喜欢摇滚乐，也不喜欢吵闹的聚会。

words.eng_def: a type of loud popular music
used after 'not' to add another negative idea

sentences.en: She saved enough dollars to buy a new house.
sentences.zh: 她存够了美元来买新房子。

words.eng_def: the money used in the US and some other countries

sentences.en: Her proposal for the project is a legal document.
sentences.zh: 她的项目提案是一份法律文件。

words.eng_def: a plan or suggestion for a group to consider

sentences.en: After a long conversation with her boss, she felt good about the future.
sentences.zh: 和老板长谈后，她对未来感觉很好。

words.eng_def: a talk between two or more people

vocabulary.eng_def: the money used in the US and some other countries

vocabulary.eng_def: an area for growing flowers or plants

vocabulary.eng_def: to make something work again or put it in good condition

vocabulary.eng_def: to go from one side to the other

vocabulary.eng_def: how heavy something is

image_prompts: A young woman sitting at a desk in an office, looking at papers with a thoughtful expression.
A modern office building with a sign that says 'Creative Agency' on the front.
A woman holding a drawing of a garden with colorful flowers and a prize ribbon next to it.
A woman using tools to fix a garden fence on a sunny day.
A woman looking at a sign that says 'Your Dream Company' with a smiling face.
A woman walking on a bridge over a river, with a university building in the background.
A woman covering her ears while loud music plays from a radio with a rock band picture.
A pile of dollar bills and coins on a table next to a small model house.
A woman handing a paper marked 'Proposal' to a man in a suit, with a law book on the desk.
Two women talking happily in a bright room, with a window showing a sunny day.
